query.accept.success.message: Query accepted and saved to history.
query.evaluator.rejected: We couldn't generate a safe query for your question. Please try rephrasing it in a different way.

query.evaluator.single_statement: Only one statement per query is allowed.
query.evaluator.unsafe_pattern: Unsafe pattern detected: {{pattern}}. Use a safer alternative.

query.evaluatorRejection.heading: Generated SQL was rejected for safety
query.evaluatorRejection.body: The system blocked this query because: {reason}
query.refine.message: We couldn't refine this query automatically. Please rephrase your question.
query.refine.heading: Please refine your question
query.refine.body.maxRetries: We tried twice and the result was the same. Try rephrasing or narrowing the question.
query.refine.body.byteEqual: The regenerated SQL was identical. Try a different phrasing.
query.refine.body.evaluatorBlocked: We can't safely answer this. Please rephrase.
query.timeout.heading: Query took too long
query.timeout.body: The source database didn't respond in time. Try a narrower question.
query.error.unauthorized: Your session has expired or you are not signed in. Please sign in again.
query.error.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
query.error.concurrent: A query is already being processed. Please wait.
query.error.llmUnavailable: The AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.

query.error.timeout: The query timed out. Please try a simpler question.
